name: agent-booster
description: AST + vector context router for AI coding agents — cut token costs 5-15x. Provides smart_read, search_context, get_symbols, and route_model MCP tools. Includes delta indexing (skips unchanged files), asymmetric embeddings for better retrieval, and an optional background daemon for instant search.
author: Sudhi Seshachala

steps.description: Install agent-booster with embeddings + file watcher
Wire MCP server, hooks, and CLAUDE.md for this repo
Start background daemon — keeps model warm, auto-indexes file changes
